title: The Negotiator — OTS / Waiver Request
description: Customer proactively negotiates a one-time settlement with a waiver request.
transcript:
ARIA: Hello, may I speak with Suresh Menon? Hi Suresh, this is ARIA from the bank calling about your personal loan — the outstanding balance is ₹2,18,000 and the account is 45 days past due.

Customer: Yes, I've been expecting your call actually. Look, I want to settle this account. I can pay a lump sum but I need a discount — I'm prepared to pay ₹1,60,000 as a one-time settlement if you can waive the rest. Can you do that?

ARIA: I appreciate that you want to resolve this, Suresh. A one-time settlement is something our team can evaluate. I'll need to escalate this to our settlements team who are authorised to consider such arrangements.

Customer: How long will that take? I want this done this month. I have the funds ready.

ARIA: Typically 3-5 working days for the settlements team to assess and respond. Can I confirm — you're offering ₹1,60,000 as a lump sum settlement, is that correct?

Customer: Yes, ₹1,60,000. Final offer. I won't pay more than that. I've already consulted an advisor and this is fair given the situation.

ARIA: Understood. I'm noting your proposal: ₹1,60,000 as a full and final settlement on the account. This will be reviewed by our settlements team and you will receive a formal response within 5 working days. Please do not make any payment until you receive a written settlement offer from us.

Customer: Okay. But please tell them to move quickly. I'm ready to pay.

ARIA: I'll mark this as urgent. Thank you for reaching out, Suresh.
